channel.title: KillBait RSS Feed
channel.description: KillBait - News highlights delivered clearly and responsibly—no clickbait, no sensationalism

item.title: Professor Abdulrahman Akinoso Elected as Oyo PDP Chairman at Party Congress
item.description: A professor from the Department of Food Technology at the University of Ibadan, Prof. Abdulrahman Akinoso, don become the new Oyo State Chairman for the Peoples Democratic Party (PDP) faction wey dey ...

item.title: Alan Carr purchases Ayton Castle in Scotland and acquires barony title for Disney+ series
item.description: Comedian and television presenter Alan Carr, aged 49, has confirmed his purchase of Ayton Castle, a 19th-century stately home located in Ayton, Scotland. The acquisition was inspired by his victorious...

item.title: Senator Warren questions Pentagon on xAI’s access to classified systems due to security concerns
item.description: Senator Elizabeth Warren (D-MA) has formally raised concerns with the Pentagon regarding Elon Musk's AI company, xAI, gaining access to classified U.S. military networks. Warren's letter to Defense Se...

item.title: Comelec Clarifies Garcia is Not Promoting Manual Counting for 2028 Elections
item.description: The Commission on Elections (Comelec) has clarified recent social media posts falsely claiming that its chairperson, George Garcia, is advocating for manual counting in the 2028 elections to prevent c...

item.title: Lok Sabha Revokes Suspension of Eight Opposition MPs, Speaker Urges Decorum
item.description: On 17th March 2026, the Lok Sabha revoked the suspension of eight opposition MPs who were barred on 3rd February for unruly behaviour. Speaker Om Birla emphasised that going forward, no placards, post...

item.title: Kyle Sandilands makes light of potential career moves while awaiting radio future
item.description: KIIS FM radio host Kyle Sandilands has made some tongue-in-cheek comments regarding the future of contestants on Australian Idol, reflecting on the uncertain job prospects for participants. Speaking p...

item.title: Police Surgeon Confirms Suffocation as Leading Cause of Death in Gul Plaza Fire
item.description: KARACHI: According to Police Surgeon Dr Summaiya Syed, the main cause of death in the devastating Gul Plaza fire was inhalational asphyxia or suffocation. The fire erupted on the night of January 17, ...

item.title: Survivor Recounts Terrifying Experience During Maiduguri Bomb Blasts
item.description: One person wey survive the bomb wahala wey happen for Maiduguri, Abacha Mustapha, don talk wetin happen when the explosions fire go off on Monday night, March 16, 2026. The blasts make plenty people s...

item.title: PM Nchemba cracks down on misuse of Sh200m in substandard school roofing project
item.description: Prime Minister Mwigulu Nchemba has directed the arrest of all officials and contractors linked to the supply of substandard roofing sheets worth about Sh200 million meant for the construction of Katav...

item.title: A guide to common modern etiquette mistakes and how to be considerate
item.description: In today’s tech-driven world, navigating social etiquette has become trickier, with smartphones, social media, and instant messaging creating new pitfalls. Common modern faux pas often arise from conv...

item.title: Calls for Greater Transparency in Regulation of Menstrual Products in South Africa
item.description: South African activists are raising concerns over the lack of transparency in the regulation of menstrual products, despite reassurances from Health Minister Aaron Motsoaledi. A recent study by the Un...

item.title: Suspected suicide bombings kill and injure scores in Maiduguri, Nigeria
item.description: On the evening of March 16, 2026, multiple bomb explosions, suspected to be suicide attacks, struck three locations in Maiduguri, the capital of Borno State in northeastern Nigeria. The blasts targete...

item.title: Britain to experience five days of warm spring sunshine with temperatures up to 20°C
item.description: Parts of the United Kingdom are set to experience a spell of warm spring weather, with meteorologists forecasting five consecutive days of sunshine. Temperatures, which reached highs of 13°C yesterday...

item.title: Fathers’ roles in education of children with disabilities in Kenya: Financial support matters, presence varies
item.description: A recent Kenyan study explored how fathers engage in the education of children with intellectual disabilities, focusing on a public special school on the coast. The research found that fathers often s...

item.title: Federal High Court in Abuja Strikes Out Cyberstalking Case Against Omoyele Sowore Over 'Illegal IGP' Comment
item.description: A Federal High Court for Abuja don strike out the cyberstalking charges wey the former Inspector-General of Police, Kayode Egbetokun, file against human rights activist and SaharaReporters publisher, ...

item.title: Tinubu Sends Security Chiefs to Maiduguri Following Deadly Bomb Attacks
item.description: Na very sad tori wey dey happen for Maiduguri, Borno State, as multiple suicide bomb blast don kill 23 people and injure over 100 others. The blasts hit markets, hospitals, and public offices shortly ...

item.title: Philippine Defense Chief raises concern over Chinese espionage network
item.description: Philippine Defense Secretary Gilberto Teodoro Jr. expressed serious concern over the presence of a Chinese espionage network operating in the Philippines. According to Teodoro, government officials ar...

item.title: Intelligence Bureau to Monitor Implementation of Government Austerity Measures
item.description: The Intelligence Bureau (IB) of Pakistan will prepare and submit a detailed report on how the government’s austerity measures are being implemented. These measures were announced on March 10 due to th...

item.title: Amazon Launches One-Hour and Three-Hour Delivery Services Across the U.S.
item.description: Amazon has expanded its delivery services in the U.S., introducing one-hour and three-hour delivery options in numerous cities. The service covers more than 90,000 items, and users can see which produ...

item.title: How Online Retailers Use Free Shipping to Influence Purchases
item.description: These days, many people are used to getting free delivery when shopping online, but the reality is that free shipping almost never truly exists. Retailers often use clever marketing strategies to make...
